Lutheran Church Massacre Survivors Association

Civil War
Memorial Map

LUMASA documents verified mass grave and massacre sites from Liberia's First and Second Civil Wars (1989 to 2003). This map is a living record built to support truth, justice, and lasting remembrance.

12 Verified Sites GPS-documented across multiple counties with field photography

Intended for survivors and families, researchers, transitional justice actors, civil society organizations, and the general public.

This map documents sites of atrocity including massacre locations and mass burials. Some visitors may find this content distressing.
